characters.name: Abby
characters.description: AbbyOccupationManager atDean and DelucaHairBlondebackstagePortrayed byAlexandra WentworthSeason(s)Season 1First seenLast seenAssassinsConnectionsEpisodes2Abbyis a character inSeason 1ofFelicity, portrayed by Alexandra Wentworth. Abby is the new manager atDean and Delucaafter Javier returns to Spain due to immigration issues. She never looks people in the eye when she speaks to them, giving Felicity the notion at first that Abby doesn't like her. However, Abby promotes Felicity to Assistant Manager. She leaves once Javier returns and gets his job back.

characters.name: Allison Covington
characters.description: Allison CovingtonrelationshipsFamilyBen Covington(son)RomancesAndrew Covington(ex-husband)backstagePortrayed byJean St. James("Pilot")Dee Wallace("The Storm")Season(s)1•4First seenLast seenPilotThe StormEpisodes2Allison Covingtonis a character onFelicity, portrayed by Jean St. James and Dee Wallace.

characters.name: Andrew Covington
characters.description: Andrew CovingtonBirthday1952[1]OccupationLawyerrelationshipsFamilyBen Covington(son)RomancesLauren(ex-girlfriend)backstagePortrayed byJohn RitterSeason(s)Season 3•Season 4First seenLast seenThe Anti-Natalie InterventionKiss And TellEpisodes7Andrew Covingtonis a character onFelicity, portrayed by John Ritter. Andrew is the father of Ben, who has been an alcoholic for Ben's entire life. This leaves Ben with anger and trust issues, as Andrew often lies due to his illness, and Ben has had to watch him mistreat Ben's mother for his whole life. Andrew has a tendency to disappear, which has often worried Ben's mother, and not keeping his promises. Ben moves to New York to get as far away from Andrew and the heavy life Ben has experienced until that point, because of his father. In Ben's junior year, Andrew reappears in his life to try and reconnect, ultimately bringing his issues with him which threaten to destroy Ben once again.

characters.name: Andrew Covington II
characters.description: Andrew Covington IIBirthdayMay 2002relationshipsFamilyBen Covington(father)Lauren(mother)Andrew Covington(paternal grandfather)Allison Covington(paternal grandmother)backstageSeason(s)Season 4Andrew Covington IIis a character inSeason 4ofFelicity. Andrew is the son of Ben Covington and Lauren, named after his paternal grandfather,Andrew Covington, who was Lauren's AA-sponsor.

characters.name: Annie Sherman
characters.description: Annie ShermanOccupationArt Professor atUniversity of New YorkHairBlonderelationshipsFamilyDavid Sherman(son)backstagePortrayed bySally KirklandSeason(s)Season 2First seenLast seenAncient HistoryPortraitsEpisodes4Annie Shermanis a character inSeason 2ofFelicity, portrayed by Sally Kirkland. Professor Sherman is an esteemed professor, teaching art at the university. Felicity is lucky enough to get a spot in her class after switching majors. After feeling let down by the professor's initial critique of her work, they establish a good rapport. Sherman asks Felicity if she would be willing to be set up on a blind date with Sherman's son, David. While Felicity is hesitant but also feels awkward about saying no to her professor, she ends up agreeing to the blind date. It's a disaster, as David is rude and blasé about it. Felicity tells him off and walks out, leading David to reconsider his actions, apologise and ask for a second chance. They start dating, much to the professor's delight, but Felicity walks a tightrope as David becomes more invested quickly, while Felicity wants them to stay casual. The situation ends up worse as Sherman, David and Felicity's parents all come to Thanksgiving atElena and Noel's Apartment, which Noel is unhappy about considering it's his teacher, too. Noel gets tipsy and Felicity feels overwhelmed by Sherman and David getting along famously with her parents. Felicity and Noel end up kissing, which Sherman walks in on. Needless to say she is furious and tells her son. They break up and Sherman becomes frosty to both Noel and Felicity in class henceforth.

characters.description: Avery SwansonrelationshipsRomancesBen Covington(kissed)backstagePortrayed byKristin LehmanSeason(s)Season 3First seenGirlfightAvery Swansonis a character inSeason 3ofFelicity, portrayed by Kristin Lehman.

characters.name: Barbara Hunter
characters.description: Barbara HunterBornBarbara HunterBirthday1960[1]relationshipsFamilyFelicity Porter(daughter)RomancesEdward Porter(ex-husband)backstagePortrayed byEve GordonFirst seenLast seenPilotThe GraduateEpisodes7 Barbara Hunteris a recurring character onFelicity. She is portrayed byEve Gordon. Barbara is Felicity's beautiful, tender and sweet mother, who had Felicity when she was only 20 years old. After Felicity leaves for college in New York, Barbara starts to miss Felicity in her life and eventually comes to re-evaluate her own life choices and make big changes. Barbara is Felicity's beautiful, tender and sweet mother, who had Felicity when she was only 20 years old. After Felicity leaves for college in New York, Barbara starts to miss Felicity in her life and eventually comes to re-evaluate her own life choices and make big changes.

characters.name: Ben Covington
characters.description: Ben CovingtonBornBenjamin Steven CovingtonBirthday1980FromPalo Alto, CaliforniaMajorPre-Med (final year)Undeclared (1st-3rd year)OccupationWaiter atDean and DelucaConstruction Worker(summer of 2000)EyesHairBlueLight BrownrelationshipsFamilyAndrew Covington II(son)Allison Covington(mother)Andrew Covington(father)RomancesFelicity Porter(girlfriend)Claire(affair)Lauren(ex-girlfriend)Avery Swanson(kissed/emotional affair)Pam(dated)Maggie Sherwood(affair)Julie Emrick(ex-girlfriend)Susan(dated)Kelly(dated in high school)FriendsSean Blumberg•Lynn McKennan•Todd MulcahybackstagePortrayed byScott SpeedmanFirst seenLast seenPilotBack To The Future Ben Covingtonis a principal character onFelicity, portrayed byScott Speedman. Ben Covington is a member of the main cast of characters and one of the main love interests ofFelicity Porter. Ben attended high school in Palo Alto, California where he was a popular athlete interested in running and swimming. Unknowingly, Ben was the object of his classmate Felicity's affections during high school. Ben is shown to have a difficult home life and fraught relationship with his father, an alcoholic who neglected Ben for much of his childhood. In an effort to get far away from his family after high school, Ben applies to and is accepted to theUniversity of New Yorkwhere he enrolls at the beginning ofSeason 1. Because of his upbringing, Ben suffers from low self-esteem and has rage issues that he works through in therapy and at support meetings for family members of alcoholics. For much of the series, Ben struggles academically and is directionless about his future. After an encounter where Ben helps save a girl who has a near-death experience, Ben decides to become an Emergency Medical Technician (EMT). However, after taking EMT classes, Ben ultimately decides that he wants to be a doctor and subsequently changes his major to pre-med. characters.name: Bill Hodges
characters.description: Bill HodgesOccupationProfessor of Organic Chemistry atUniversity of New YorkbackstagePortrayed byJim OrtliebSeason(s)Season 4First seenLast seenThe DeclarationThe Power Of The ExEpisodes7Bill Hodgesis a recurring character inSeason 4ofFelicity, portrayed byJim Ortlieb. Hodges teaches Organic Chemistry in Medicine atUniversity of New York. He is a strict and ruthless educator, who clashes with the rebellious Ben when the latter starts the course in his senior year. Despite this initial impasse, Hodges eventually comes to see the potential in Ben, who wins him over with his determination to succeed at Medicine.

characters.name: Carole Anderson
characters.description: Carole AndersonBirthday1961/1962FromNew YorkOccupationDesigner and partnerrelationshipsFamilyJulie Emrick(biological daughter)Matthew Andersen(son)Amanda Andersen(daughter)RomancesTom Andersen †(husband)backstagePortrayed byJane KaczmarekSeason(s)1•2First seenLast seenFriendsThe Biggest Deal There IsEpisodes5Carole Andersenis a character onFelicity. She is portrayed by Jane Kaczmarek. Carole is the biological mother ofJulie Emrick. She had Julie at 18 and gave her up for adoption. In 1999, Carole is a partner in a architectural design company. She married her husband, Tom, in 1986, six years after giving Julie up. Carole is the biological mother ofJulie Emrick. She had Julie at 18 and gave her up for adoption. characters.name: Chloe
characters.description: ChloeOccupationLibrarianrelationshipsRomancesSean Blumberg(dated)backstagePortrayed byAli HillisSeason(s)Season 1First seenLast seenAssassinsDocuventaryEpisodes2Chloeis a character inSeason 1ofFelicity, portrayed by Ali Hillis.

characters.name: David Sherman
characters.description: David ShermanBirthday1974[1]MajorPhotographyOccupationGrad Student atUniversity of New YorkrelationshipsFamilyAnnie Sherman(mother)RomancesFelicity Porter(dated)Jessica(ex-fiancée)backstagePortrayed byHenri LubattiSeason(s)Season 2First seenLast seenCrashPortraitsEpisodes5David Shermanis a character inSeason 2ofFelicity, portrayed by Henri Lubatti. David is the son of Felicity's art professor,Annie Sherman, who sets David and Felicity up on a blind date. They meet at a French restaurant where David is quite rude, doesn't engages with her questions and makes the evening difficult. He orders a bottle of wine in French and asks the waitress to bring him as much wine as it would take to make him disappear (assuming Felicity does not speak French.) Felicity calls Julie to tell her that the date is a nightmare, Julie gives her permission to leave the terrible blind date. Felicity tells David, she "has never had such a bad date" in French and leaves. He looks shocked. David shows up at her dorm room the next evening and asks her out again. She is quite reluctant and calls him self-absorbed, bad mannered and bitter. He explains it's the first date he's had in months; that his old girlfriend Jessica showed up at the airport while he was in France to inform him she would be marrying his best friend instead of travelling with him and that's why he was such a jerk.

characters.name: Elena Tyler
characters.description: Elena TylerBirthday1980MajorPre-MedEducation1998—2002Pre-med student atUniversity of New YorkEyesHairDark BrownBlackrelationshipsFamilyMr. Tyler(father)Mrs. Tyler †(mother)RomancesTracy(boyfriend/ex-fiancé)Trevor O'Donnell(dated)DeForrest Ingram(ex-boyfriend)Finn(liaison)Blair(dated)backstagePortrayed byTangi MillerFirst seenLast seenPilotBack To The FutureEpisodes79Elena Tyleris a principal character onFelicity, portrayed byTangi Miller. Elena was raised in one of the poorer neighborhoods outside New York City. She got herself a scholarship to a fancy high school and took advantage of it, graduating valedictorian and earning a full scholarship that brought her to college in Manhattan. The scholarship fell through, but the same determination that got her here is keeping her here. She has a straightforward approach to life that is unusual for some of her new friends, not least Felicity.[1] Elena is a dedicated, serious and tenacious 18-year-old student who aspires to become a doctor. She is very competitive and always wants to be the best, possibly stemming from feeling she has to succeed in life and can only rely on herself, since her relationship with her father isn't great and her mother died when she was young. Despite having to grow up fast and not wanting to rely on others, or perhaps because of it, Elena is an incredibly loyal friend. characters.name: Eli
characters.description: EliMajorArtOccupationStudent atUniversity of New YorkrelationshipsRomancesFelicity Porter(one night stand)backstagePortrayed bySimon RexSeason(s)1•2First seenLast seenTodd Mulcahy Part IIPortraitsEpisodes4Eliis a character onFelicity, portrayed by Simon Rex. Eli is a boho type art student atUniversity of New York. He meets Felicity when she rediscovers her interest in art and visits the studios at the university. They get along well and he represents the draw Felicity feels to the art world and a hitherto neglected part of herself. When Noel's ex-girlfriend Hannah resurfaces and asks Noel for help with something, Noel starts being conflicted between his old feelings for Hannah and his new relationship with Felicity. Felicity feels Noel pulling away and tries to keep him while also unsure how much to communicate her fears about Hannah. When they have a fight and Noel leaves with Hannah, Felicity goes to the art studio to paint late at night and Eli's there. She and Eli end up having sex, Felicity's first time doing so. Afterwards, she regrets it as she loves Noel and when Noel finds out they break up. Noel goes looking for a fight with Eli, who tries to diffuse the situation. Felicity goes to see Eli to apologise for how things happened, but he says it's okay that she just wanted to escape, but tells her surreptitiously that he likes her and if it doesn't work out with Noel, she should call him. Around Christmas her sophomore year, Felicity and Noel are drawn together again and Felicity has dreams about what to do, which include Eli.

characters.name: Eli
characters.description: EliMajorArtOccupationStudent atUniversity of New YorkrelationshipsRomancesFelicity Porter(one night stand)backstagePortrayed bySimon RexSeason(s)1•2First seenLast seenTodd Mulcahy Part IIPortraitsEpisodes4Eliis a character onFelicity, portrayed by Simon Rex. Eli is a boho type art student atUniversity of New York. He meets Felicity when she rediscovers her interest in art and visits the studios at the university. They get along well and he represents the draw Felicity feels to the art world and a hitherto neglected part of herself. When Noel's ex-girlfriend Hannah resurfaces and asks Noel for help with something, Noel starts being conflicted between his old feelings for Hannah and his new relationship with Felicity. Felicity feels Noel pulling away and tries to keep him while also unsure how much to communicate her fears about Hannah. When they have a fight and Noel leaves with Hannah, Felicity goes to the art studio to paint late at night and Eli's there. She and Eli end up having sex, Felicity's first time doing so. Afterwards, she regrets it as she loves Noel and when Noel finds out they break up. Noel goes looking for a fight with Eli, who tries to diffuse the situation. Felicity goes to see Eli to apologise for how things happened, but he says it's okay that she just wanted to escape, but tells her surreptitiously that he likes her and if it doesn't work out with Noel, she should call him. Around Christmas her sophomore year, Felicity and Noel are drawn together again and Felicity has dreams about what to do, which include Eli.

characters.name: Faye Rotundi

characters.name: Felicity Porter
characters.description: Felicity PorterBornFelicity Elizabeth PorterBirthdayOctober/November[1][2]1980[3]FromPalo Alto, CAMajorArtPre-Med(freshman year)OccupationBarista atDean and DelucaResident Advisor atUniversity of New YorkEducation1998—2002Student atUniversity of New YorkEyesHairGrayLight BrownrelationshipsFamilyBarbara Hunter(mother)Edward Porter(father)RomancesBen Covington(boyfriend)Noel Crane(ex-boyfriend)Greg Stenson(ex-boyfriend)David Sherman(dated)Eli(liaison)backstagePortrayed byKeri RussellFirst seenLast seenPilotBack To The FutureEpisodes84Felicity Porteris the title character ofFelicity. She is portrayed byKeri Russell. Resident Advisor atUniversity of New York Felicity Porter, the daughter of a Stanford-Educated medical doctor, was always expected to follow in her father's footsteps and study medicine at Stanford. However, at her high school graduation ceremony, Felicity connects with her longtime crush,Ben Covington, who informs her that he will be enrolling at theUniversity of New Yorkin the fall. On a whim, Felicity decides to change her college plans and follow Ben to New York, a decision that perplexes and concerns her parents. Although Felicity initially believes her decision to move to New York is motivated by her interest in Ben, she slowly discovers that her real motivation comes from her desire to forge her own path and pursue her own interests away from the watchful eyes of her parents. In doing so, Felicity eventually abandons her initial plans of becoming a medical doctor and changes her major to art. In New York, Felicity forms a group of tight-knit friends, consisting of other studentsNoel Crane,Julie Emrick,Elena Tyler,Meghan Rotundi, and Ben Covington, Ben's roommateSean Blumberg, and Felicity's boss atDean and Deluca,Javier Quintata. characters.name: Greg Stenson
characters.description: Greg StensonBornGregory StensonBirthday1977OccupationDirector of theUNY Student Health CenterPre-med Graduate atUniversity of New YorkrelationshipsRomancesFelicity Porter(ex-girlfriend)backstagePortrayed byChris William MartinSeason(s)Season 2First seenLast seenTruth Or ConsequencesThe Aretha TheoryEpisodes9Greg Stensonis a recurring character inSeason 2ofFelicity. He is portrayed byChris William Martin. Greg is a very intense, dedicated person hoping to become a doctor one day. He volunteers at theUNY Student Health Centerwhere he's become the director within a year. Greg is taking the MCATs to apply to medical school. Greg had an addiction problem and was arrested for cocaine possession in Spring 1998. He is adamant at starting anew in his life, which is why he is so dedicated to his work, aside from wanting to help people. Greg is a very intense, dedicated person hoping to become a doctor one day. characters.name: Javier Quintata
characters.description: Javier QuintataBornJavier Clemente QuintataAKAJotaOccupationManager atDean and DelucaEducation2001—?Student atUniversity of New YorkEyesHairBrownDark BrownrelationshipsRomancesSamuel(husband)Otis(liaison)Guillermo(fling)FriendsFelicity Porter•Mitchell•FrancisbackstagePortrayed byIan GomezFirst seenLast seenSpookedBack To The FutureEpisodes49Javier Quintatais a recurring character onFelicity, portrayed byIan Gomez. Javier is a kind, direct and sassy guy, who works as the manager ofDean and Deluca. Javier didn't want to go to college when he was younger and, as an adult, decides to enroll as a Freshman atUniversity of New York. When Javier was supposed to take the SATs, he went to the beach with a guy instead.[1]He is a loving friend and mentor to the friend group and has a special relationship with Felicity and Ben. In season one, Javier was set to be deported back to Spain and proposed marriage to Felicity so he would be able to get a green card and stay in the U.S. to stay with his boyfriend. His boyfriend then agreed to move to Spain, so Javier and Felicity broke it off and he moved back to spain. Javier is a kind, direct and sassy guy, who works as the manager ofDean and Deluca. characters.description: John PapaleoOccupationGuidance Counsellor atUniversity of New YorkEyesHairBrownBlackbackstagePortrayed byDarnell WilliamsSeason(s)Season 1First seenLast seenPilotFelicity Was HereEpisodes3John Papaleois a character inSeason 1ofFelicity, portrayed by Darnell Williams.

characters.name: Julie Emrick
characters.description: Julie EmrickBornJulie AndersonBirthday10 March 1980FromMaineMajorMusicOccupationMusicianEducationStudent atUniversity of New YorkHairBrownrelationshipsFamilyCarole Anderson(biological mother)Tom Anderson †(biological father)Matthew Anderson(biological brother)Amanda Anderson(biological sister)RomancesNoel Crane(hook-up)Ben Covington(ex-boyfriend)backstagePortrayed byAmy Jo JohnsonFirst seenLast seenPilotFelicity InterruptedEpisodes50Julie Emrickis a principal character onFelicity, portrayed byAmy Jo Johnson. Julie was born March 10, 1980 at Columbia Presbyterian in New York. Then 18-year-old Carole gave Julie up for adoption as she did not have the means to look after her newborn. The father was not aware of the birth. Julie went on to have a loving family and a good upbringing. At the end of Julie's sophomore year, her birth mother visits Julie to tell her that her biological father is ill and needs a transplant, hoping that Julie will be a match. She is, but she lies and tells everyone that she's not. Julie spends that summer with her biological family, as her biological father's illness grows worse, and he succumbs to it. After that, Julie has a breakdown and leaves New York.[1] Julie arrives in New York from Maine and, like most other freshmen, doesn't know anyone. She meets Felicity in class where Julie sees her crying and offers comfort. They become friends, albeit with a caveat: Felicity introduces Julie to Ben, who becomes very interested in Julie and the feeling is mutual. Julie temporarily stymies their mutual attraction when she learns how infatuated Felicity is with Ben and they agree to be just friends. Julie reveals to Felicity that she came to New York to find her biological parents. Julie meets Zack, a film student at the University of New York, in the laundry room amidst Zack realizing that he has accidentally dyed all of his clothes pink. Zack pursues Julie, who is uncertain how she feels. At the Halloween party at the Loft, he kisses Julie and she freaks out. She agrees to start seeing him and watches his short film, which he later asks her to record music for. One night, Zack comes to Julie's dorm room and rapes her. Julie is traumatised and Zack eventually realises what he has done to her. He apologises and leaves the university. Julie tries to go on with her life in New York, but finds it difficult after the trauma she has experienced. Ben is there for Julie and comforts her. This leads to them developing feelings for each other and they start dating. Julie slowly seems to be getting a little better and starts writing her music again, performing atEpstein Bar. Julie also starts her search for her biological mother in earnest and finds that she lives in New York. Julie hesitates in telling Carole Anderson who she is and instead takes and internship at her firm to be near and get to know her. Ben advices Julie against this, saying she should be honest about who she is. When Julie tells Carole, Julie gets disappointed as Carole
